summary: This week's clearest multi-platform winners are the Portable Neck Fan and Kojic Acid Serum, both confirmed across Amazon, Google Trends, AND TikTok simultaneously — the Neck Fan is riding a real-time summer heatwave demand spike with 60K+ units bought on Amazon last month and viral #SummerMustHave content flooding TikTok, while Kojic Acid Serum is being propelled by 1,600% TikTok view growth and K-beauty creator content that is converting directly to Amazon BSR climbs. Supporting cross-platform winners — Homeika Cordless Vacuum ($25M+ TikTok GMV meeting Amazon demand), Hair Repair Mask (search + shelf momentum), and Sauna Blanket (~80K monthly searches intersecting Amazon new releases) — round out a week where summer cooling, brightening skincare, and home wellness are the three dominant demand vectors a dropshipper should be sourcing into right now.
